expectations.text: States that `set_group_by_electrode_group` does NOT exist on v1's SortGroup, in any phrasing — does not affirm that v1 supports the v0 helper
expectations.evidence: Title 'No — set_group_by_electrode_group does not exist on v1's SortGroup' and 'The v1 rewrite ... intentionally dropped the electrode-group helper'.
Recommends `SortGroup.set_group_by_shank` as the only v1 sort-group population helper.

expectations.text: Verifies with `code_graph.py find-method` (agent tool), a version-specific source read, or Python introspection on the imported v1 SortGroup — not memory
expectations.evidence: Provides `code_graph.py find-method set_group_by_electrode_group`, grep output, and `[m for m in dir(SortGroup) if 'set_group' in m]`.

expectations.text: Cites distinct v0 and v1 source paths to anchor the version difference
